data.title: Halliburton reports Q4 2025 net income of $589M ($0.70/share) compared to $18M ($0.02/share) in Q3 2025, showing significant growth.
data.description: Halliburton Company reported a net income of $589 million, or $0.70 per diluted share, for the fourth quarter of 2025. The adjusted net income, excluding "Impairments and other charges" and tax adjustments, stood at $576 million, or $0.69 per diluted share. This marks a significant increase compared to the third quarter of 2025, where the net income was $18 million, or $0.02 per diluted share, and the adjusted net income was $496 million. The strong performance in the fourth quarter showcases a substantial improvement in profitability for Halliburton Company.

data.title: Northisle shares corporate and exploration update, with focus on 2026 execution plan after 2025 activities review.
data.description: In British Columbia, Northisle has announced its latest updates regarding activities in 2025 and projections for 2026. The company is pleased to share its plans moving forward.

data.title: BioTown Biogas appoints Christopher J. Pino as CEO; specializes in converting livestock waste to renewable energy. Pino brings 15 years of experience from South Jersey Industries.
data.description: In Reynolds, Indiana, BioTown Biogas revealed the appointment of Christopher J. Pino as their new Chief Executive Officer. BioTown is known for its work in converting livestock waste into renewable natural gas and electric power, contributing to carbon negativity. Pino, who previously spent close to 15 years at South Jersey Industries (SJI), an energy infrastructure company in Folsom, NJ, will lead BioTown in collaboration with Green Rock Energy Partners. This move marks a strategic shift for the company as they aim to further their endeavors in the renewable energy sector.

data.title: Vista Gold to present at Metals Investor Forum 2026 in January. CEO to join John Kaiser for conference session.
data.description: Vista Gold Corp. (NYSE American and TSX: VGZ) will be participating in the Metals Investor Forum 2026 scheduled for January 23-24, 2026, at the Fairmont Pacific Rim Hotel in Vancouver, British Columbia. Frederick H. Earnest, President and CEO of Vista, will be alongside John Kaiser from Kaiser Research Online during Session 5, starting at 4:40 p.m. PST on Friday, January 23. Mr. Earnest will present to investors on the same day.

data.title: Dime Community Bancshares, Inc. has strong Q4 results with 15% EPS increase on linked quarter basis.
data.description: Dime Community Bancshares, Inc. has announced robust results for the fourth quarter, showing a 15% increase in earnings per share compared to the previous quarter. The positive growth demonstrates the company's strong performance and financial resilience. The specific numbers related to this increase were not provided, but it indicates significant progress in the company's financial performance.

data.title: Sonic Auto to release Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 18, 2026 at 7:00 AM Eastern; conference call at 11:00 AM.
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina-based Sonic Automotive, Inc. (NYSE:SAH), a major automotive retailer in the US, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of fiscal 2025 on Wednesday, February 18, 2026, at 7:00 A.M. (Eastern Time). The senior officials will conduct a conference call at 11:00 A.M. (Eastern Time) on the same day. The investor presentation and earnings press release will be available earlier that morning.

data.title: Timken Company (TKR) to release Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results on Feb. 4. Important date: Jan. 21.
data.description: The Timken Company, a prominent global technology leader specializing in engineered bearings and industrial motion, has announced plans to unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on Wednesday, Feb. 4. The report will be made public before the market opens on that day. Timken is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol TKR and further information can be found on their website at www.timken.com.

data.title: Partnership between BD and Ypsomed expands to cater to growing biologics market, enhancing self-injection systems.
data.description: Increased cooperation and creativity between companies will lead to better choices for pharmaceutical companies and patients in need of high-capacity self-injection devices. The collaboration is set to enhance options in this sector. This development is taking place between BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) and a company based in Burgdorf, Switzerland. The partnership was officially announced on January 21, 2026. BD, which is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol BDX, is a major player in the healthcare industry. The collaboration aims to address the growing needs in the market for self-injection systems, catering to the demand for high-volume solutions benefiting both pharmaceutical companies and patients.

data.title: Rockwell Powers up Lucid's Saudi factory in EV push with FactoryTalk MES system; factory in KAEC.
data.description: Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK) has enhanced its partnership with Lucid Group (NASDAQ: LCID) to assist the automaker's growth at a new manufacturing facility in Saudi Arabia. Situated in King Abdullah Economic City (KAEC), this plant is the first of its kind in the Kingdom and complements Saudi Arabia's industrial ambitions under Vision 2030. Lucid will incorporate Rockwell Automation's software solutions, including the FactoryTalk MES, to streamline production in vital areas like general assembly, paint, stamping, body, and powertrain. This move aims to enhance production efficiency by offering real-time visibility, traceability, and control capabilities.

data.title: Talos Energy extends credit facility maturity to 2030, $700 million borrowing base reaffirmed.
data.description: Talos Energy Inc. has recently disclosed the signing of an Amended and Restated Credit Agreement, maintaining the Company's borrowing base at $700 million. This agreement also extends the maturity date to January 20, 2030.

data.title: IGT celebrates 50th anniversary with wins at ICE Barcelona 2026: Named "Best Slot Provider of the Year" and earns ICE Landmark Award. Everi's Cash Redemption Terminal wins "Best Cash Handling Product" at Euro Casino Awards. Las Vegas, Jan 21, 2026.
data.description: A company was awarded the title of "Best Slot Provider of the Year" at the International Gaming Awards and also received an ICE Landmark Award. Additionally, their Premium Cash Redemption Terminal was recognized as the "Best Cash Handling Product" at the European Casino Awards. These achievements were announced by IGT in Las Vegas on January 21, 2026, marking a significant milestone for the company in the gaming industry.

data.title: MIAX sells MIAXdx to Robinhood-Susquehanna joint venture, retains 10% stake. Deal finalized on Jan 21, 2026.
data.description: Miami International Holdings, Inc. (MIAX) has decided to maintain a 10% ownership stake in the Exchange and Clearinghouse. The company, based in Princeton, New Jersey and Miami, made this announcement on January 21, 2026. MIAX is known for its advanced technology in creating and managing regulated financial markets. The retention of the 10% stake signifies their continued involvement and commitment to the exchange.

data.title: Global Veterinary Diagnostics Market to grow at 10.75% CAGR by 2035 as demand for early disease detection and precision diagnostics rises.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, it was reported that the Global Veterinary Diagnostics Market is experiencing a significant evolution, driven by the growing emphasis on early disease detection, preventive healthcare, and precise diagnostics for companion and production animals. This trend is observed globally as veterinary healthcare systems are placing more importance on these aspects. This shift in focus is leading to notable advancements in veterinary diagnostics sector, with a surge in demand for such services.
